proposed_claim: A nonce-based commitment detects changes to the committed source payload when the verifier has the exact candidate payload and nonce.

allowed_wording_after_gate: The release candidate reproduced the C4 commitment and portable-custody decisions.
prohibited_wording: encryption; confidentiality by hashing; proof of semantic or clinical correctness; operational nonce secrecy

proposed_claim: B0-B2 quantify the local reference-pipeline processing application-byte and storage-proxy increment for identical frozen inputs.
minimum_evidence: preregistered baselines; pilot excluded; minimum twenty paired independent process blocks; p50 p95 p99; raw data; failures retained; reproducible analysis
current_evidence: C5 retained five excluded pilot blocks and twenty confirmatory paired blocks; 60 retained processes; 7680 operation rows; 60 paired increments; 18 aggregates; zero process validation verification digest or exclusion failures; W1 only; W2 omitted prospectively; reported host and source/output digests retained
allowed_wording_now: For the frozen synthetic W1 case on the reported host the complete B2 path added a median 9.023 ms to operation p50 9.290 ms to p95 and 9.668 ms to p99 relative to B0; it added 16205 canonical application bytes and a 215339-byte final local storage proxy over 128 operations.
allowed_wording_after_gate: The release package retained the exact C5 corpus and reproduced its structural calculations and claim boundaries.
prohibited_wording: total production EHR overhead; hospital latency; production scalability; network bytes; database storage; organisational cost reduction; negligible or acceptable overhead without an external criterion
